items.title: Calcium signaling in human and mouse microglia exhibit differential susceptibility to phytocannabinoids.
items.authors: Ivana Pilchova; Andrea Fleig; Reinhold Penner
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Neurological disorders affect over 40% of the global population and are driven in part by microglia-mediated neuroinflammation that depends on calcium (Ca²⁺) signaling. Cannabis-derived compounds (CBx) modulate microglial activation and cytokine release, however, the impact of understudied CBx on Ca2+ signaling pathways controlling inflammatory responses remains largely unknown. METHODS: Here, we systematically examined the effects of over 22 CBx on key microglial Ca2+ signaling pathways. Using pharmacological modulators, live-cell Ca2+ imaging, immunofluorescence, and cytokine and nitric oxide assays, we characterized store-operated Ca2+ entry (SOCE) and purinergic signaling dynamics, inflammatory responses, and CBx effects in human (HMC3) and mouse (BV2) microglia under resting and activated conditions. RESULTS: We found that microglial SOCE in both mouse and human cell line models were potently inhibited by the same three, minor, acidic CBx - CBGA, CBGVA, CBDVA. In BV2, at least seven CBx (CBD, CBG, CBDVA, CBDA, CBGA, CBDV, CBNM) inhibited LPS-induced proinflammatory secretion of nitric oxide (NO) and TNF-α. Despite the profound SOCE inhibition in HMC3, CBx failed to inhibit downstream proinflammatory cytokine release in TNF-α - or IL-1β-activated cells. We found major differences in Ca2+ signaling between the models, including purinergic pathways, where HMC3 cells appear to express a more limited purinome with more subdued signaling responses. Purinergic Ca2+ responses to ATP in BV2, especially the delayed phase, was suppressed by at least eight CBx, and most prominently by CBDVA, CBGVA and CBGA. We observed partial, indirect involvement of P2X4, P2 X7, and P2Y13 purinoceptors and propose additional Ca2+ signaling targets mediating the anti-inflammatory properties of CBx. Additionally, we documented the pro-inflammatory potential of CBCA and CBNA that is likely facilitated by their ability to mobilize intracellular Ca2+ levels in both, human and mouse microglia. CONCLUSIONS: These findings provide a comprehensive qualitative and quantitative assessment of how individual CBx influence main Ca2+ signaling pathways in microglia and identify novel anti-inflammatory candidates with therapeutic potential for targeting microglial activation. Microglia are specialized immune cells that protect the brain from infection, injury, and other threats. To perform these functions, microglia rely on calcium signals inside the cell, which help control when and how strong they become activated. While this response is important for maintaining brain health, excessive activation of microglia can contribute to chronic inflammation and has been linked to several neurological disorders.Compounds found in cannabis have long been recognized for their anti-inflammatory properties, but their effects in calcium signaling in microglia are not well understood. In this study, we examined how 22 cannabis-derived compounds influence calcium signaling in human and mouse microglial cells. We focused on two important signaling systems involved in microglial activation: calcium entry pathways and ATP-mediated cell communication. We found that individual cannabis-derived compounds produced markedly different effects on microglial calcium signaling. Several understudied compounds strongly reduced calcium entry in both human and mouse microglia. However, these changes translated into reduced inflammatory responses only in mouse microglia, highlighting important differences between human and mouse models.Our findings further suggest that ATP-mediated signaling may play a greater role in regulating microglial inflammation than calcium entry alone. Together, these results show that cannabis-derived compounds can modify key signaling pathways in microglia, but their anti-inflammatory effects depend on the specific cellular mechanisms involved. This work improves our understanding of how phytocannabinoids influence brain immune cells and may help guide future studies aimed at controlling neuroinflammation.

items.title_cn: 人和小鼠小胶质细胞中的钙信号传导对植物大麻素表现出不同的敏感性。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：神经系统疾病影响着全球超过 40% 的人口，部分是由小胶质细胞介导的神经炎症驱动的，而神经炎症依赖于钙 (Ca2+) 信号传导。大麻衍生化合物 (CBx) 调节小胶质细胞活化和细胞因子释放，然而，尚未充分研究的 CBx 对控制炎症反应的 Ca2+ 信号通路的影响仍然很大程度上未知。方法：在这里，我们系统地研究了超过 22 种 CBx 对关键小胶质细胞 Ca2+ 信号通路的影响。使用药理调节剂、活细胞 Ca2+ 成像、免疫荧光以及细胞因子和一氧化氮测定，我们表征了人 (HMC3) 和小鼠 (BV2) 小胶质细胞在静息和激活条件下的钙池操纵 Ca2+ 进入 (SOCE) 和嘌呤能信号动力学、炎症反应和 CBx 效应。结果：我们发现小鼠和人类细胞系模型中的小胶质细胞 SOCE 均受到相同的三种次要酸性 CBx - CBGA、CBGVA、CBDVA 的有效抑制。在 BV2 中，至少七种 CBx（CBD、CBG、CBDVA、CBDA、CBGA、CBDV、CBNM）抑制 LPS 诱导的一氧化氮 (NO) 和 TNF-α 的促炎分泌。尽管对 HMC3 具有深刻的 SOCE 抑制作用，但 CBx 未能抑制 TNF-α 或 IL-1β 激活细胞中下游促炎细胞因子的释放。我们发现模型之间 Ca2+ 信号传导存在重大差异，包括嘌呤能途径，其中 HMC3 细胞似乎表达更有限的嘌呤组，信号反应更减弱。 BV2 中对 ATP 的嘌呤能 Ca2+ 反应，尤其是延迟期，至少被 8 种 CBx 抑制，其中最显着的是 CBDVA、CBGVA 和 CBGA。我们观察到 P2X4、P2 X7 和 P2Y13 嘌呤受体部分、间接参与，并提出了介导 CBx 抗炎特性的额外 Ca2+ 信号传导靶点。此外，我们还记录了 CBCA 和 CBNA 的促炎潜力，这可能是由于它们在人类和小鼠小胶质细胞中调动细胞内 Ca2+ 水平的能力所促进的。结论：这些发现为个体 CBx 如何影响小胶质细胞中的主要 Ca2+ 信号通路提供了全面的定性和定量评估，并确定了新的……

items.title: Neuroinflammatory suppression of astrocytic BMAL1 defines a selective reactive astrocyte program.
items.authors: Xingqi Meng; Ming Ho Choi; Xuebing Zhang; Jin Young Kim
items.abstract: Astrocyte reactivity is a hallmark of neuroinflammatory diseases. Astrocytes contain functional circadian clocks that drive daily homeostatic rhythms, making them potential regulators of the transition from homeostatic to reactive states. However, it remains unclear whether neuroinflammatory conditions alter endogenous astrocyte clocks and whether these clock alterations contribute to pathway changes associated with reactivity. Here, we combined in vivo and in vitro lipopolysaccharide (LPS)-based neuroinflammation models with circadian profiling, chromatin analysis, and bulk RNA-sequencing of purified microglia and astrocytes. In vivo and in vitro, neuroinflammation reduced the amplitude of Bmal1 and Per1 rhythms and changed clock gene expression patterns across circadian time, while reactive markers gained rhythmic expression. In vitro, these clock changes occurred in astrocytes exposed to the inflammatory glial environment, but not after direct LPS treatment, indicating that paracrine glial signaling is the main driver. RNA-sequencing of microglia from the same neuroinflammatory glial cultures identified Il1b and Tnf as strong candidate mediators, and combined IL-1β/TNFα treatment was sufficient to suppress astrocyte clock gene expression and induce reactive marker expression. This clock suppression was accompanied by a modest reduction in BMAL1 protein but a stronger reduction in average BMAL1 occupancy at multiple clock target loci, including Per1 and Nr1d1. To define BMAL1-dependent pathways in astrocytes, we compared gene expression in wild-type and Bmal1-deficient astrocytes, and then compared these changes with those observed under neuroinflammatory conditions. Bmal1 loss alone did not reproduce the full inflammatory response. Instead, it identified a selective subset of the reactive astrocyte transcriptome, mainly involving suppression of cell-cycle and chromosome-segregation pathways with limited innate immune activation. Together, these findings identify astrocytic BMAL1 as a regulator of a selective pathway subset within reactive astrocytes in response to neuroinflammatory conditions.
items.title_en: Neuroinflammatory suppression of astrocytic BMAL1 defines a selective reactive astrocyte program.
items.title_cn: 星形胶质细胞 BMAL1 的神经炎症抑制定义了选择性反应性星形胶质细胞程序。
items.abstract_cn: 星形胶质细胞反应性是神经炎症疾病的标志。星形胶质细胞含有驱动日常稳态节律的功能性生物钟，使它们成为从稳态到反应状态转变的潜在调节者。然而，目前尚不清楚神经炎症状况是否会改变内源性星形胶质细胞时钟以及这些时钟改变是否会导致与反应性相关的通路变化。在这里，我们将体内和体外基于脂多糖 (LPS) 的神经炎症模型与纯化的小胶质细胞和星形胶质细胞的昼夜节律分析、染色质分析和批量 RNA 测序相结合。在体内和体外，神经炎症降低了 Bmal1 和 Per1 节律的幅度，并改变了整个昼夜节律的时钟基因表达模式，而反应性标记物获得了节律性表达。在体外，这些时钟变化发生在暴露于炎症神经胶质环境的星形胶质细胞中，但在直接 LPS 处理后不会发生，表明旁分泌神经胶质信号传导是主要驱动因素。对来自相同神经炎症胶质细胞培养物的小胶质细胞进行 RNA 测序，发现 Il1b 和 Tnf 是强候选介质，IL-1β/TNFα 联合治疗足以抑制星形胶质细胞时钟基因表达并诱导反应性标记物表达。这种时钟抑制伴随着 BMAL1 蛋白的适度减少，但多个时钟目标位点（包括 Per1 和 Nr1d1）的平均 BMAL1 占用率大幅减少。为了定义星形胶质细胞中的 BMAL1 依赖性途径，我们比较了野生型和 Bmal1 缺陷型星形胶质细胞中的基因表达，然后将这些变化与神经炎症条件下观察到的变化进行比较。仅 Bmal1 缺失并不能再现完整的炎症反应。相反，它鉴定了反应性星形胶质细胞转录组的选择性子集，主要涉及细胞周期和染色体分离途径的抑制以及有限的先天免疫激活。总之，这些发现确定星形胶质细胞 BMAL1 是反应性星形胶质细胞内响应神经炎症条件的选择性途径子集的调节剂。

items.title: Safety evaluation of repeated administration of umbilical cord mesenchymal stem cell-derived exosomes.
items.authors: Ting Lan; Tao-Tao Tang; Jing-Jing Di; Suo-Fu Qin; Aihemaiti Muzaipaier; Qin-Yu Zhou; Bi-Cheng Liu; Qiu-Li Wu
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Mesenchymal stem cell-derived exosomes (MSC-Exos) have shown considerable therapeutic potential in regenerative medicine. However, the biosafety profile of these exosomes following repeated administration has not been adequately characterised, and this knowledge gap continues to hinder clinical translation. METHODS: Human umbilical cord mesenchymal stem cell-derived exosomes (hucMSC-Exos) were produced on a xeno-free platform by replacing fetal bovine serum (FBS) with human platelet lysate (hPL). A relatively comprehensive and integrated repeated-dose preclinical biosafety profile assessment was then conducted using polyethylene glycol (PEG)-Liposomes as reference nanovesicles. The assessment included pharmacokinetic and distribution analyses using DiD labelling, haematological cytology testing, quantitative measurement of inflammatory cytokines and chemokines, histopathological scoring, and RNA sequencing. RESULTS: In this study, the safety assessment revealed that: (1) hucMSC-Exos primarily accumulated in the liver and spleen and exhibited an approximately 4-h circulation time; (2) repeated intravenous administration of hucMSC-Exos for 30 days did not result in overt systemic inflammation, and the evaluated haematological and biochemical parameters remained within the normal range; (3) RNA sequencing showed that hucMSC-Exos avoided immune pathway activation (e.g., IL-17/antigen presentation) triggered by PEG-Liposomes, instead enriching complement-coagulation cascades (e.g., C1qc, C6 upregulation) and metabolic pathways (steroidogenesis, retinol metabolism). Together, these findings suggest that hucMSC-Exos have a favourable biosafety profile in a murine model and support further preclinical evaluation for regenerative medicine applications. CONCLUSION: This study suggests that repeated intravenous administration of hucMSC-Exos confers a relatively favourable biosafety profile in a murine model and provides preliminary preclinical evidence for further investigation towards clinical translation.
items.title_en: Safety evaluation of repeated administration of umbilical cord mesenchymal stem cell-derived exosomes.
items.title_cn: 重复施用脐带间充质干细胞衍生的外泌体的安全性评估。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：间充质干细胞衍生的外泌体（MSC-Exos）在再生医学中显示出巨大的治疗潜力。然而，这些外泌体在重复给药后的生物安全性尚未得到充分表征，这种知识差距继续阻碍临床转化。方法：通过用人血小板裂解物（hPL）替代胎牛血清（FBS），在无异源平台上产生人脐带间充质干细胞衍生的外泌体（hucMSC-Exos）。然后使用聚乙二醇（PEG）-脂质体作为参考纳米囊泡进行相对全面和综合的重复剂量临床前生物安全性评估。评估包括使用 DiD 标记的药代动力学和分布分析、血液细胞学测试、炎症细胞因子和趋化因子的定量测量、组织病理学评分和 RNA 测序。结果：本研究的安全性评估显示：（1）hucMSC-Exos主要在肝脏和脾脏中积累，循环时间约为4小时； (2)连续30天重复静脉注射hucMSC-Exos没有导致明显的全身炎症，并且评估的血液学和生化参数保持在正常范围内； (3) RNA测序显示hucMSC-Exos避免了PEG-脂质体触发的免疫途径激活（例如IL-17/抗原呈递），而是丰富了补体凝血级联（例如C1qc、C6上调）和代谢途径（类固醇生成、视黄醇代谢）。总之，这些研究结果表明，hucMSC-Exos 在小鼠模型中具有良好的生物安全性，并支持再生医学应用的进一步临床前评估。结论：本研究表明，反复静脉注射 hucMSC-Exos 在小鼠模型中具有相对有利的生物安全性，并为进一步研究临床转化提供了初步的临床前证据。

items.title: Core binding factor β preserves early chondrogenic identity and prevents hypertrophic transition in cartilage organoids formation.
items.authors: Xiangguo Che; Xian Jin; Dong-Kyo Lee; Eun-Jung Heo; Min Park; Jinyoung Oh; Hee-June Kim; Hyun-Ju Kim
items.abstract: Human-induced pluripotent stem cells (hiPSCs) represent a promising cell source for cartilage regeneration because of their self-renewal capacity and chondrogenic potential. However, the propensity of hiPSC-derived chondrocytes to undergo hypertrophic maturation remains a major obstacle to generating stable articular cartilage. Here, we identified core binding factor β (CBFβ) as a critical regulator of early chondrogenic identity and a suppressor of hypertrophic transition during hiPSC-derived cartilage organoid formation. CBFβ expression was markedly diminished in degenerative articular cartilage from both human osteoarthritis (OA) specimens and mouse OA models, and cartilage-specific ablation of Cbfβ accelerated cartilage structural deterioration and matrix loss. Notably, CBFβ was secreted by non-mineralizing cells, including chondrocytes and vascular smooth muscle cells, suggesting an autocrine/paracrine regulatory role. Pharmacological inhibition with Brefeldin A reduced extracellular CBFβ levels, whereas blockade of exosome release by GW4869 had minimal effect, indicating a secretion-associated mechanism independent of exosomes. Recombinant human CBFβ (rhCBFβ) treatment enhanced the chondrocyte phenotype by upregulating early chondrogenic markers (SOX9, COL2A1) while suppressing hypertrophic and catabolic markers ( RUNX2, MMP13). In hiPSC-derived cartilage organoids, rhCBFβ enhanced matrix deposition and increased COL2A1 and SOX9 expression. Transcriptomic profiling and qRT-PCR validation further demonstrated that rhCBFβ activated cartilage matrix-associated and anti-hypertrophic transcriptional programs, including upregulation of PTHRP, HIF1α, HDAC4, MGP, CILP, and ALK5, together with suppression of RUNX2.Collectively, these findings establish CBFβ as a key regulator of articular cartilage homeostasis and highlights its therapeutic potential for cartilage regeneration in OA. The ability of rhCBFβ to preserve early chondrogenic identity while preventing hypertrophic maturation offers a promising strategy for cartilage tissue engineering. Further preclinical studies are warranted to evaluate its efficacy and accelerate clinical translation for OA therapy.
items.title_en: Core binding factor β preserves early chondrogenic identity and prevents hypertrophic transition in cartilage organoids formation.
items.title_cn: 核心结合因子 β 保留了早期软骨形成的特性，并防止软骨类器官形成过程中的肥大转变。
items.abstract_cn: 人诱导多能干细胞（hiPSC）因其自我更新能力和软骨形成潜力而成为软骨再生的有前途的细胞来源。然而，hiPSC 衍生的软骨细胞肥大成熟的倾向仍然是生成稳定关节软骨的主要障碍。在这里，我们确定核心结合因子 β (CBFβ) 是早期软骨形成的关键调节因子，也是 hiPSC 衍生的软骨类器官形成过程中肥大转变的抑制因子。在人类骨关节炎 (OA) 标本和小鼠 OA 模型的退变关节软骨中，CBFβ 表达显着减少，并且 Cbfβ 的软骨特异性消融加速了软骨结构恶化和基质损失。值得注意的是，CBFβ 由非矿化细胞（包括软骨细胞和血管平滑肌细胞）分泌，表明其具有自分泌/旁分泌调节作用。 Brefeldin A 的药理学抑制降低了细胞外 CBFβ 水平，而 GW4869 对外泌体释放的阻断作用最小，表明分泌相关机制不依赖于外泌体。重组人 CBFβ (rhCBFβ) 治疗通过上调早期软骨形成标记物（SOX9、COL2A1）同时抑制肥大和分解代谢标记物（RUNX2、MMP13）来增强软骨细胞表型。在 hiPSC 衍生的软骨类器官中，rhCBFβ 增强基质沉积并增加 COL2A1 和 SOX9 表达。转录组学分析和 qRT-PCR 验证进一步证明，rhCBFβ 激活软骨基质相关和抗肥大转录程序，包括 PTHRP、HIF1α、HDAC4、MGP、CILP 和 ALK5 的上调，以及 RUNX2 的抑制。总的来说，这些发现确立了 CBFβ 作为关节软骨稳态的关键调节因子，并强调了其在 OA 软骨再生中的治疗潜力。 rhCBFβ 能够保留早期软骨形成特性，同时防止肥大成熟，为软骨组织工程提供了一种有前途的策略。需要进一步的临床前研究来评估其疗效并加速骨关节炎治疗的临床转化。

items.title: Microglial TDP-43 mediates myelin refinement and represses Tyrobp cryptic exon inclusion in mice.
items.authors: Anne-Claire Compagnion; Andranik Ivanov; Anil Rana; Felipe Espinoza; Thomas Sandmann; Fanny S Martineau; Katia Monsorno; Roberta Facchinetti
items.abstract: TDP-43 proteinopathy is a hallmark of neurodegenerative disorders such as amyotrophic lateral sclerosis and frontotemporal dementia where mislocalization of TDP-43 has been observed in neurons and glial cells. However, the role of TDP-43 in microglia and the consequences of its loss of function remain unexplored. Combining magnetic resonance imaging, and confocal, and electron microscopy, we uncovered structural changes and myelin abnormalities in the early postnatal brain of mice lacking microglial TDP-43. Spatial transcriptomics further revealed an enriched interferon-responsive signature associated with oligodendrocyte dysfunction. Early depletion of microglial TDP-43 led to motor deficits in adult mice. Mechanistically, knocking out TDP-43 impaired microglial ability to engulf and degrade myelin. It also led to cryptic exon inclusion in the Tyrobp mRNA, resulting in truncated DAP12 protein, thus causing defective TREM2 signaling. Our findings reveal a role for TDP-43 in regulating the TREM2-DAP12 axis in mice, highlighting a previously unrecognized mechanism through which TDP-43 controls microglial function.
items.title_en: Microglial TDP-43 mediates myelin refinement and represses Tyrobp cryptic exon inclusion in mice.
items.title_cn: 小胶质细胞 TDP-43 介导小鼠髓磷脂细化并抑制 Tyrobp 隐性外显子包含。
items.abstract_cn: TDP-43蛋白病是神经退行性疾病的标志，例如肌萎缩侧索硬化症和额颞叶痴呆，其中在神经元和神经胶质细胞中观察到TDP-43的错误定位。然而，TDP-43 在小胶质细胞中的作用及其功能丧失的后果仍有待探索。结合磁共振成像、共聚焦和电子显微镜，我们发现了缺乏小胶质细胞 TDP-43 的小鼠出生后早期大脑的结构变化和髓磷脂异常。空间转录组学进一步揭示了与少突胶质细胞功能障碍相关的丰富的干扰素反应特征。小胶质细胞 TDP-43 的早期消耗导致​​成年小鼠运动缺陷。从机制上讲，敲除 TDP-43 会损害小胶质细胞吞噬和降解髓磷脂的能力。它还导致 Tyrobp mRNA 中包含隐秘的外显子，导致 DAP12 蛋白被截短，从而导致 TREM2 信号传导缺陷。我们的研究结果揭示了 TDP-43 在调节小鼠 TREM2-DAP12 轴中的作用，强调了 TDP-43 控制小胶质细胞功能的先前未被认识的机制。

核心发现：TDP-43蛋白病是神经退行性疾病的标志，例如肌萎缩侧索硬化症和额颞叶痴呆，其中在神经元和神经胶质细胞中观察到TDP-43的错误定位。然而，TDP-43 在小胶质细胞中的作用及其功能丧失的后果仍有待探索。结合磁共振成像、共聚焦和电子显微镜，我们发现了缺乏小胶质细胞 TDP-43 的小鼠出生后早期大脑的结构变化和髓磷脂异常。空间转录组学进一步揭示了与少突胶质细胞功能障碍相关的丰富的干扰素反应特征。小胶质细胞 TDP-43 的早期消耗导致​​成年小鼠运动缺陷。从机制上讲，敲除 TDP-43 会损害小胶质细胞吞噬和降解髓磷脂的能力。它还导致 Tyrobp mRNA 中包含隐秘的外显子，导致 DAP12 蛋白被截短，从而导致 TREM2 信号传导缺陷。我们的研究结果揭示了 TDP-43 在调节小鼠 TREM2-DAP12 轴中的作用，强调了 TDP-43 控制小胶质细胞功能的先前未被认识的机制。

items.title: ACE2 deficiency alters brain RAS signaling to induce pro-inflammatory microglial remodeling and Worsen Parkinson's disease pathology.
items.authors: Tingting Liu; Yuheng Ren; Juntang Lin; Jianshe Wei
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Parkinson's disease (PD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder characterized by α-synuclein aggregation and dopaminergic neuron loss. Resident central nervous system (CNS) microglia dynamically switch between pro- and anti-inflammatory states under pathological stress. While cerebral renin-angiotensin system (RAS) participates in PD progression, the molecular connection linking brain RAS to microglial inflammatory remodeling remains undetermined. METHODS: We combined multi-omics mining of public GEO PD datasets with multiple in vitro and in vivo experiments, including CRISPR-generated ACE2-knockout BV2 microglia, MPTP-treated wild-type and Ace2+/- heterozygous mice, alongside western blot, immunohistochemistry and immunofluorescence, to unravel RAS-mediated microglial regulation in PD. RESULTS: MPTP robustly triggers pro-inflammatory polarization of midbrain microglia. GSEA analysis of immune-related differential genes revealed enrichment in neuroinflammation, mitochondrial metabolism and antigen presentation pathways. We identified functional hub miRNAs and seven AGTR1-centered hub genes with tight ACE2-AGTR1 interaction. ACE2 deletion disturbs cerebral RAS balance, elevating Ang II and AGTR1 levels. Hyperactivated AGTR1 sequentially activates JAK1-STAT3-ERK, JNK-MAPK, PI3K-AKT-mTOR, Sirt1-FoxO1 and TLR4-Myd88 inflammatory axes, shifting microglia toward a pro-inflammatory phenotype and elevating neuronal injury markers. These data confirm ACE2 deficiency exacerbates PD pathology mainly via overactivated AGTR1 signaling. CONCLUSION: Disrupted brain RAS homeostasis induces pro-inflammatory microglial remodeling and worsens PD neurodegeneration. This study reveals novel pathogenic mechanisms and identifies promising therapeutic targets for PD treatment.
items.title_en: ACE2 deficiency alters brain RAS signaling to induce pro-inflammatory microglial remodeling and Worsen Parkinson's disease pathology.
items.title_cn: ACE2 缺陷会改变大脑 RAS 信号传导，从而诱导促炎性小胶质细胞重塑和恶化帕金森病病理。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：帕金森病（PD）是一种进行性神经退行性疾病，其特征是 α-突触核蛋白聚集和多巴胺能神经元丢失。驻留的中枢神经系统（CNS）小胶质细胞在病理应激下动态地在促炎状态和抗炎状态之间切换。虽然大脑肾素-血管紧张素系统 (RAS) 参与 PD 进展，但大脑 RAS 与小胶质细胞炎症重塑之间的分子联系仍不清楚。方法：我们将公共 GEO PD 数据集的多组学挖掘与多个体外和体内实验相结合，包括 CRISPR 生成的 ACE2 敲除 BV2 小胶质细胞、MPTP 处理的野生型和 Ace2+/- 杂合小鼠，以及蛋白质印迹、免疫组织化学和免疫荧光，以揭示 RAS 介导的 PD 中小胶质细胞的调控。结果：MPTP 强烈触发中脑小胶质细胞的促炎极化。免疫相关差异基因的 GSEA 分析揭示了神经炎症、线粒体代谢和抗原呈递途径的富集。我们鉴定了功能性中枢 miRNA 和 7 个以 AGTR1 为中心的中枢基因，它们具有紧密的 ACE2-AGTR1 相互作用。 ACE2 缺失扰乱大脑 RAS 平衡，升高 Ang II 和 AGTR1 水平。过度激活的 AGTR1 依次激活 JAK1-STAT3-ERK、JNK-MAPK、PI3K-AKT-mTOR、Sirt1-FoxO1 和 TLR4-Myd88 炎症轴，使小胶质细胞向促炎表型转变，并升高神经元损伤标志物。这些数据证实 ACE2 缺陷主要通过过度激活的 AGTR1 信号传导加剧 PD 病理。结论：大脑 RAS 稳态破坏会诱导促炎性小胶质细胞重塑，并加剧 PD 神经变性。这项研究揭示了新的致病机制，并确定了有希望的帕金森病治疗靶点。

items.title: PCSK9 as an Emerging Target for Cerebrovascular Dysfunction and Neuroinflammation in Ischemic Stroke.
items.authors: Carolina Vela; Josephin Wagner; Pal Pacher; Falk Lohoff
items.abstract: Cerebrovascular disease is a leading cause of death and long-term disability worldwide, most commonly manifesting as ischemic stroke. The pathogenesis of ischemic stroke is largely driven by atherosclerotic diseases of the cerebral and extracranial vasculature, where lipid accumulation and vascular inflammation play central roles. Proprotein convertase subtilisin/kexin type 9 (PCSK9) is a key mediator in this process. Elevated circulating PCSK9 contributes to stroke risk and severity across multiple stages of disease progression, promoting atherogenesis, plaque instability, and thrombosis. It exacerbates acute ischemic injury by elevating circulating low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C) and promoting vascular inflammation via upregulation of monocyte adhesion, foam cell formation, and cytokine release. Following cerebral ischemia, upregulated PCSK9 also contributes to neuroinflammation within the brain parenchyma, thereby driving secondary neuronal injury and poor neurological outcomes. Preclinical stroke models have shown that PCSK9 inhibition (PCSK9i) is effective within this neurovascular context, attenuating both vascular and neuroinflammatory signaling and thereby limiting ischemic injury. Recent clinical trials have focused on the potential of PCSK9i for broader cardiometabolic indications and stroke prevention, drawing on evidence that treatment can reduce the risk of these events and improve neurological outcomes for patients.
items.title_en: PCSK9 as an Emerging Target for Cerebrovascular Dysfunction and Neuroinflammation in Ischemic Stroke.
items.title_cn: PCSK9 作为缺血性中风中脑血管功能障碍和神经炎症的新兴靶点。
items.abstract_cn: 脑血管疾病是全世界死亡和长期残疾的主要原因，最常见的表现为缺血性中风。缺血性中风的发病机制很大程度上是由脑和颅外血管系统的动脉粥样硬化性疾病驱动的，其中脂质积累和血管炎症起着核心作用。前蛋白转化酶枯草杆菌蛋白酶/kexin 9 型 (PCSK9) 是该过程中的关键介质。循环中 PCSK9 升高会导致疾病进展多个阶段的中风风险和严重程度，促进动脉粥样硬化、斑块不稳定和血栓形成。它通过提高循环低密度脂蛋白胆固醇 (LDL-C) 并通过上调单核细胞粘附、泡沫细胞形成和细胞因子释放促进血管炎症来加剧急性缺血性损伤。脑缺血后，PCSK9 上调还会导致脑实质内的神经炎症，从而导致继发性神经元损伤和不良的神经系统预后。临床前中风模型表明，PCSK9 抑制 (PCSK9i) 在这种神经血管环境中有效，可减弱血管和神经炎症信号传导，从而限制缺血性损伤。最近的临床试验重点关注 PCSK9i 在更广泛的心脏代谢适应症和中风预防方面的潜力，证据表明治疗可以降低这些事件的风险并改善患者的神经系统结果。

items.title: Photoreceptor-targeted engineered exosomes encapsulating black phosphorus quantum dots for alleviating photoreceptor degeneration.
items.authors: Jia Liang; Xiangqing Hei; Lu Chen; Zhenhua Zou; Yuke Ji; Lujia Feng; Wangting Li; Yijing Zhuang
items.abstract: Photoreceptor degeneration is a major cause of irreversible visual impairment worldwide, most notably in retinitis pigmentosa (RP). Here, we developed a dual-targeted therapeutic nanoplatform by loading black phosphorus quantum dots (BPQDs) into human dental pulp mesenchymal stem cell-derived exosomes (hDPSC-Exos) and surface-modifying with cell-penetrating peptide transactivated transcription (TAT) and photoreceptor-specific peptide MH42, namely TAT/MH42-engineered black phosphorus quantum dot-loaded exosomes (M/T-BPQD@Exos). M/T-BPQD@Exos showed typical exosomal morphology and good uniformity. In vitro, M/T-BPQD@Exos effectively protected 661 W photoreceptor cells against N-methyl-N-nitrosourea (MNU) injury. In vivo, M/T-BPQD@Exos specifically accumulated in the outer nuclear layer (ONL) and significantly preserved retinal structure and visual function in MNU-induced photoreceptor degeneration rats. Biosafety assessment confirmed no obvious systemic toxicity and inflammation. Mechanistically, M/T-BPQD@Exos alleviated calcium overload, maintained mitochondrial integrity, and suppressed mitochondrial apoptosis by regulating Bcl-2, Bax, and cleaved caspase-3. This study provides a safe and precise strategy for photoreceptor protection in retinal degenerative diseases.
items.title_en: Photoreceptor-targeted engineered exosomes encapsulating black phosphorus quantum dots for alleviating photoreceptor degeneration.
items.title_cn: 针对光感受器的工程外泌体封装了黑磷量子点，可减轻光感受器退化。
items.abstract_cn: 光感受器变性是全世界不可逆视力损害的主要原因，尤其是色素性视网膜炎（RP）。在这里，我们通过将黑磷量子点（BPQD）加载到人牙髓间充质干细胞来源的外泌体（hDPSC-Exos）中，并用细胞穿透肽反式激活转录（TAT）和光感受器特异性肽MH42进行表面修饰，即TAT/MH42工程化的黑磷量子点加载外泌体（M/T-BPQD@Exos），开发了一种双靶向治疗纳米平台。 M/T-BPQD@Exos表现出典型的外泌体形态和良好的均匀性。在体外，M/T-BPQD@Exos 有效保护 661 W 感光细胞免受 N-甲基-N-亚硝基脲 (MNU) 损伤。在体内，M/T-BPQD@Exos 特异性积累在外核层 (ONL) 中，并在 MNU 诱导的光感受器变性大鼠中显着保留了视网膜结构和视觉功能。生物安全评估证实没有明显的全身毒性和炎症。从机制上讲，M/T-BPQD@Exos 通过调节 Bcl-2、Bax 和 cleaved caspase-3 减轻钙超载，维持线粒体完整性并抑制线粒体凋亡。这项研究为视网膜退行性疾病中的光感受器保护提供了安全而精确的策略。

items.title: Functional deficits in immortalized microglial cell lines limit their utility for modeling neuroinflammation.
items.authors: Xiaoyan Xiong; Qilong Wu; Xuecheng Qiu; Suning Ping
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Microglia, the resident immune cells of the central nervous system (CNS), play a pivotal role in brain development and disease. Although primary microglia serve as the gold standard for in vitro investigations, their limited proliferative capacity has driven the widespread use of immortalized cell lines, with the BV2 cell line being the most prominent. However, accumulating evidence demonstrates that BV2 cells display profound functional discrepancies relative to primary microglia. AIM: To generate optimized lentivirus-mediated human telomerase reverse transcriptase (hTERT)-immortalized microglial cell lines, and to compare their functional similarity to primary microglia against the BV2 cell line. METHOD: We established two murine microglial cell lines (CM-A1, CM-A3) via lentiviral hTERT transduction. Cellular characteristics including CD11b expression, cell morphology, phagocytic activity, and inflammatory gene transcriptional responses to lipopolysaccharide (LPS) were comprehensively evaluated. RESULTS: CM-A1 and CM-A3 exhibited higher CD11b surface expression and basal phagocytic capacity relative to BV2 cells. Nevertheless, all immortalized cell lines presented notable functional defects, including reduced CD11b surface abundance, blunted morphological transformation following LPS stimulation, loss of LPS-triggered phagocytic upregulation, and dampened induction of pro-inflammatory genes. CONCLUSIONS: These findings reveal that both hTERT-immortalized microglial lines and BV2 fail to recapitulate critical dynamic functional responses observed in primary microglia, highlighting the importance of cautious model selection in neuroimmunological research.
items.title_en: Functional deficits in immortalized microglial cell lines limit their utility for modeling neuroinflammation.
items.title_cn: 永生化小胶质细胞系的功能缺陷限制了它们在神经炎症建模中的实用性。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：小胶质细胞是中枢神经系统（CNS）的常驻免疫细胞，在大脑发育和疾病中发挥着关键作用。尽管原代小胶质细胞是体外研究的金标准，但其有限的增殖能力推动了永生化细胞系的广泛使用，其中 BV2 细胞系最为突出。然而，越来越多的证据表明，BV2 细胞相对于原代小胶质细胞表现出深刻的功能差异。目的：生成优化的慢病毒介导的人端粒酶逆转录酶（hTERT）永生化小胶质细胞系，并比较它们与原代小胶质细胞和 BV2 细胞系的功能相似性。方法：我们通过慢病毒 hTERT 转导建立了两种小鼠小胶质细胞系（CM-A1、CM-A3）。全面评估细胞特征，包括 CD11b 表达、细胞形态、吞噬活性和炎症基因对脂多糖 (LPS) 的转录反应。结果：相对于 BV2 细胞，CM-A1 和 CM-A3 表现出更高的 CD11b 表面表达和基础吞噬能力。然而，所有永生化细胞系都表现出显着的功能缺陷，包括 CD11b 表面丰度减少、LPS 刺激后形态转化迟钝、LPS 触发的吞噬细胞上调丧失以及促炎基因的诱导减弱。结论：这些研究结果表明，hTERT 永生化小胶质细胞系和 BV2 都无法重现在原代小胶质细胞中观察到的关键动态功能反应，这凸显了神经免疫学研究中谨慎模型选择的重要性。

items.title: aPKC exclusion from the apical cortex in enteroblasts maintains stem cell homeostasis in Drosophila.
items.abstract: Proper control of stem cell behavior is crucial for maintaining tissue homeostasis. In the Drosophila midgut, smooth septate junction (sSJ)-associated proteins play a crucial role in regulating intestinal stem cell (ISC) proliferation via atypical PKC (aPKC) activity. Here, we investigate the underlying mechanism. We found that aPKC in the apical cortex diminishes during enteroblast differentiation, in accordance with the apical accumulation of sSJ proteins. In sSJ protein-deficient conditions, aPKC remained in the apical cortex in enteroblasts, accompanied by ISC overproliferation. Manipulation of Kibra, an activator of the Hippo pathway with aPKC-binding properties, affected sSJ proteins depletion-induced ISC overproliferation in an aPKC-binding domain-dependent manner, revealing a link between aPKC and the Hippo- and/or Misshapen-Yorkie pathway in ISC proliferation. This study provides novel insights into the mechanism underlying stem cell regulation, in which an antagonistic interaction between aPKC and junctional proteins in differentiating progenitors is involved.
items.title_en: aPKC exclusion from the apical cortex in enteroblasts maintains stem cell homeostasis in Drosophila.
items.title_cn: 在果蝇中，肠成细胞中 aPKC 被排除在顶皮层之外可维持干​​细胞稳态。
items.abstract_cn: 正确控制干细胞行为对于维持组织稳态至关重要。在果蝇中肠中，平滑隔膜连接 (sSJ) 相关蛋白通过非典型 PKC (aPKC) 活性在调节肠干细胞 (ISC) 增殖中发挥着至关重要的作用。在这里，我们研究了潜在的机制。我们发现，在肠母细胞分化过程中，顶端皮质中的 aPKC 会减少，这与 sSJ 蛋白的顶端积累一致。在 sSJ 蛋白缺乏的条件下，aPKC 保留在肠成细胞的顶皮质中，并伴有 ISC 过度增殖。 Kibra（一种具有 aPKC 结合特性的 Hippo 通路激活剂）的操作，以 aPKC 结合域依赖性方式影响 sSJ 蛋白耗尽诱导的 ISC 过度增殖，揭示了 aPKC 与 ISC 增殖中的 Hippo 和/或 Misshapen-Yorkie 通路之间的联系。这项研究为干细胞调节的机制提供了新的见解，其中涉及分化祖细胞中 aPKC 和连接蛋白之间的拮抗相互作用。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Microglial TDP-43 mediates myelin refinement and represses Tyrobp cryptic exon inclusion in mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Anne-Claire Compagnion; Andranik Ivanov; Anil Rana; Felipe Espinoza; Thomas Sandmann; Fanny S Martineau; Katia Monsorno; Roberta Facchinetti
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: TDP-43 proteinopathy is a hallmark of neurodegenerative disorders such as amyotrophic lateral sclerosis and frontotemporal dementia where mislocalization of TDP-43 has been observed in neurons and glial cells. However, the role of TDP-43 in microglia and the consequences of its loss of function remain unexplored. Combining magnetic resonance imaging, and confocal, and electron microscopy, we uncovered structural changes and myelin abnormalities in the early postnatal brain of mice lacking microglial TDP-43. Spatial transcriptomics further revealed an enriched interferon-responsive signature associated with oligodendrocyte dysfunction. Early depletion of microglial TDP-43 led to motor deficits in adult mice. Mechanistically, knocking out TDP-43 impaired microglial ability to engulf and degrade myelin. It also led to cryptic exon inclusion in the Tyrobp mRNA, resulting in truncated DAP12 protein, thus causing defective TREM2 signaling. Our findings reveal a role for TDP-43 in regulating the TREM2-DAP12 axis in mice, highlighting a previously unrecognized mechanism through which TDP-43 controls microglial function.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Microglial TDP-43 mediates myelin refinement and represses Tyrobp cryptic exon inclusion in mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 小胶质细胞 TDP-43 介导小鼠髓磷脂细化并抑制 Tyrobp 隐性外显子包含。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: TDP-43蛋白病是神经退行性疾病的标志，例如肌萎缩侧索硬化症和额颞叶痴呆，其中在神经元和神经胶质细胞中观察到TDP-43的错误定位。然而，TDP-43 在小胶质细胞中的作用及其功能丧失的后果仍有待探索。结合磁共振成像、共聚焦和电子显微镜，我们发现了缺乏小胶质细胞 TDP-43 的小鼠出生后早期大脑的结构变化和髓磷脂异常。空间转录组学进一步揭示了与少突胶质细胞功能障碍相关的丰富的干扰素反应特征。小胶质细胞 TDP-43 的早期消耗导致​​成年小鼠运动缺陷。从机制上讲，敲除 TDP-43 会损害小胶质细胞吞噬和降解髓磷脂的能力。它还导致 Tyrobp mRNA 中包含隐秘的外显子，导致 DAP12 蛋白被截短，从而导致 TREM2 信号传导缺陷。我们的研究结果揭示了 TDP-43 在调节小鼠 TREM2-DAP12 轴中的作用，强调了 TDP-43 控制小胶质细胞功能的先前未被认识的机制。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Developmental genetic determinants of the human cerebrospinal fluid-ventricular system.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Garrett Allington; Evan Dennis; Qiang Li; Stephen McGee; Neel H Mehta; Kedous Y Mekbib; Izuho Hatada; Matthew C Weston
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Primary enlargement of the cerebrospinal fluid (CSF)-filled brain ventricles, known as congenital cerebral ventriculomegaly (CCV), is a hallmark of congenital hydrocephalus. CCV is also enigmatically but frequently associated with autism and other neurodevelopmental disorders. To gain insight into the developmental genetic regulation of the human CSF-ventricular system, we conducted an integrated, multiomic study of about 2700 trio-based exomes from patients with primary CCV. We found that about 25% of cases were associated with rare, damaging de novo variants in mutation-intolerant genes, many of which are linked to other dominant Mendelian disorders. Thirty-five exome-wide significant CCV genes and dozens of other high-confidence CCV genes converged on pathways involved in ATP-dependent Brahma-related gene 1/Brahma-associated factor chromatin remodeling, histone H3 lysine 4 methylation, and phosphoinositide 3-kinase signaling. Knockout of selected CCV genes in mouse models supported that de novo variants in CCV genes caused ventriculomegaly by impairing both CSF dynamics and cortical cytoarchitecture through dysregulation of neuroprogenitor cell growth and maturation in the ventricular and subventricular zones. These findings indicated that genetic and epigenetic programs coordinate the "hand-in-glove" development of the CSF-ventricular system with that of the cerebral cortex and establish a genetic connection between CCV and neurodevelopmental disorders, potentially explaining why some patients with hydrocephalus continue to exhibit CCV and neurodevelopmental disorders despite CSF shunting. We suggest that combined brain imaging and whole-exome sequencing could enable early detection of, and intervention for, autism and other neurodevelopmental disorders.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Developmental genetic determinants of the human cerebrospinal fluid-ventricular system.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类脑脊液心室系统的发育遗传决定因素。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 充满脑脊液 (CSF) 的脑室原发性增大，称为先天性脑室扩大 (CCV)，是先天性脑积水的标志。 CCV 也很神秘，但经常与自闭症和其他神经发育障碍相关。为了深入了解人类脑脊液-脑室系统的发育遗传调控，我们对来自原发性 CCV 患者的约 2700 个基于三重体的外显子组进行了一项综合多组学研究。我们发现，大约 25% 的病例与不耐受突变的基因中罕见的、破坏性的从头变异有关，其中许多与其他显性孟德尔疾病有关。 35 个全外显子组显着的 CCV 基因和数十个其他高置信度 CCV 基因聚集在参与 ATP 依赖性 Brahma 相关基因 1/Brahma 相关因子染色质重塑、组蛋白 H3 赖氨酸 4 甲基化和磷酸肌醇 3 激酶信号传导的通路上。在小鼠模型中敲除选定的 CCV 基因支持了 CCV 基因的从头变异通过脑室和脑室下区神经祖细胞生长和成熟失调损害脑脊液动力学和皮质细胞结构而引起脑室扩大。这些发现表明，遗传和表观遗传程序协调脑脊液脑室系统与大脑皮层“密切相关”的发育，并在 CCV 和神经发育障碍之间建立遗传联系，这可能解释了为什么一些脑积水患者尽管存在 CSF 分流，但仍然表现出 CCV 和神经发育障碍。我们认为，结合脑成像和全外显子组测序可以实现自闭症和其他神经发育障碍的早期检测和干预。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Single-nucleus multiome shows motor neuron glutamate overactivation in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Eriko Takeuchi; Yoshiaki Yasumizu; Junko Morita; Masakazu Ishikawa; Kotaro Ogawa; Daisuke Motooka; Daisuke Okuzaki; Miho Nagata
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is a neurodegenerative disease that causes motor neuron degeneration. However, the mechanisms underlying the selective vulnerability of motor neurons and the involvement of non-motor neuron cells in ALS remain unclear. To investigate ALS pathology at the cellular level, we performed a single-nucleus multiome analysis, including RNA sequencing and chromatin accessibility profiling, on the motor cortex (75 583 nuclei) and spinal cord (62 711 nuclei) from patients with ALS (n = 6) and controls (n = 6). Our results revealed significant gene expression changes specifically in spinal motor neurons, including upregulation of a metabotropic glutamate receptor, GRM5, and enhanced glutamate signalling. By integrating genome-wide association study data, we identified ALS-associated single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) in regulatory regions, suggesting cell-type-specific enrichment of risk, especially in microglia. These findings suggest that changes in spinal motor neurons and their surrounding environment, including glutamate signalling, may be involved in ALS pathology. The study also provides valuable resources for future research on the underlying mechanisms and potential therapeutic targets.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Single-nucleus multiome shows motor neuron glutamate overactivation in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 单核多组显示肌萎缩侧索硬化症中运动神经元谷氨酸过度激活。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）是一种导致运动神经元变性的神经退行性疾病。然而，运动神经元选择性脆弱性和非运动神经元细胞参与 ALS 的机制仍不清楚。为了在细胞水平上研究 ALS 病理学，我们对 ALS 患者 (n = 6) 和对照 (n = 6) 的运动皮层（75 583 个核）和脊髓（62 711 个核）进行了单核多组分析，包括 RNA 测序和染色质可及性分析。我们的结果揭示了脊髓运动神经元中的显着基因表达变化，包括代谢型谷氨酸受体 GRM5 的上调和谷氨酸信号传导的增强。通过整合全基因组关联研究数据，我们在调控区域鉴定了 ALS 相关的单核苷酸多态性 (SNP)，表明细胞类型特异性的风险富集，尤其是在小胶质细胞中。这些发现表明脊髓运动神经元及其周围环境（包括谷氨酸信号传导）的变化可能与 ALS 病理有关。该研究还为未来研究潜在机制和潜在治疗靶点提供了宝贵的资源。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Fus-depleted oligodendrocytes reduce neuronal damage and Alzheimer's disease progression in the AppNL-G-F mouse.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Te-Hsuan Tung; Sudhagar Babu; Xiangting Tang; Alec L Sciutto; Micah Romer; Prathima Racha; Rong Xu; Victoria Fiesler
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is an age-dependent neurodegenerative disorder and represents the most common type of dementia, increasing in incidence at an alarming rate in the aging population. The hallmarks of the disease are amyloid plaque accumulation, microglia and astrocyte activation, and loss of presynaptic structure leading to cognitive decline. Recently, oligodendrocyte (OL) and myelin abnormalities have emerged as important contributors to the pathogenesis of AD. In normal brain homeostatic conditions, OL maintain neuronal health through myelin axon interactions and by supplying neurotrophic and metabolic support. How strengthening OL function may support neuronal health in AD neurodegeneration remains to be fully characterized and represents a gap in knowledge and a missed therapeutic opportunity. This study sought to examine how myelin and OL may improve neuronal deficits associated with AD. We have generated a novel mouse model (AD/cKO) by crossing the AppNL-G-F mouse, an established AD model, which carries three human AD mutations in the mouse App gene, with the FusOLcKO whose OL depleted of Fus (Fused in Sarcoma) produce thicker myelin associated with greater cholesterol biosynthesis. We evaluated spatial memory function with standardized cognitive testing. We evaluated microglia density and state, astrocytic activation and toxic phenotype, myelin density, cholesterol content, amyloid plaque burden, presynaptic structures, and neuronal hypoxic and oxidative damage in the hippocampus and cortex. We characterized the transcriptome of AD/cKO hippocampal OL compared to AD by using single-cell transcriptomic studies. Spatial working memory was fully preserved in the aged AD/cKO mouse relative to the AD mouse. This outcome was associated with reduced neuronal oxidative damage, preserved presynaptic structures at the amyloid plaque niches, and a shift in microglia state at the niches in both hippocampus and cortex. In contrast, amyloid plaque burden and microglia density were decreased in the hippocampus but not in cortex, uncoupling the neuronal and microglia effects from the amyloid burden. Fus dependent myelin increase was present in both hippocampus and cortex. Single-cell transcriptomics of AD/cKO hippocampal OL revealed upregulation of energy metabolism and antioxidant genes, suggesting a role of OL enhanced energy metabolism in mediating protection of neurons and affecting microglia state in AD pathology. This work provides new insight into how oligodendrocytes may protect neurons in AD, communicate with other glial cellular players, and point to potential targets for disease intervention aimed at slowing AD progression.

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Dual tumour-myeloid targeting of glioblastoma with GPNMB CAR-T cells.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Neil Savage; Shan Grewal; Muhammad Vaseem Shaikh; Franz J Zemp; Dillon Mckenna; Nicholas Mikolajewicz; Hinda Najem; Joanna Pyczek
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Glioblastoma is a lethal brain tumour for which current multimodal treatment rarely prevents recurrence1. Therapeutic failure is driven by extensive intratumoural cellular heterogeneity2 with a microenvironment dominated by tumour-associated macrophages that sustain tumour growth and immunosuppression3. Although chimeric antigen receptor (CAR)-T cell therapies are being developed for glioblastoma, sustained response has been undermined by non-uniform antigen expression, antigen loss and microenvironmental barriers that are not directly engaged by tumour-targeting designs4. These limitations motivate new strategies that address the disease as a coupled tumour-immune system rather than a single malignant compartment. Here we use a multi-omic target discovery platform to identify GPNMB as a dual-compartment antigen in glioblastoma. Anti-GPNMB CAR-T cells showed potent anti-tumour activity, with long-term disease control in orthotopic patient-derived xenografts and syngeneic glioma models through concomitant depletion of GPNMB+ tumour and immunosuppressive myeloid populations. By collapsing tumour control and microenvironmental reprogramming, these findings provide a new strategy for antigen selection and targeting in heterogenous, myeloid-rich solid cancers.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Dual tumour-myeloid targeting of glioblastoma with GPNMB CAR-T cells.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 使用 GPNMB CAR-T 细胞对胶质母细胞瘤进行双肿瘤-骨髓靶向治疗。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤是一种致命的脑肿瘤，目前的多模式治疗很少能防止复发1。治疗失败的原因是广泛的肿瘤内细胞异质性2，其微环境以维持肿瘤生长和免疫抑制的肿瘤相关巨噬细胞为主3。尽管针对胶质母细胞瘤的嵌合抗原受体 (CAR)-T 细胞疗法正在开发中，但持续的反应已被不均匀的抗原表达、抗原丢失和与肿瘤靶向设计不直接相关的微环境障碍所破坏。这些限制激发了新的策略，将这种疾病作为一个耦合的肿瘤免疫系统而不是单一的恶性区室来解决。在这里，我们使用多组学靶标发现平台将 GPNMB 鉴定为胶质母细胞瘤中的双室抗原。抗 GPNMB CAR-T 细胞显示出有效的抗肿瘤活性，通过同时消除 GPNMB+ 肿瘤和免疫抑制性骨髓细胞群，在原位患者来源的异种移植物和同基因神经胶质瘤模型中实现长期疾病控制。通过破坏肿瘤控制和微环境重编程，这些发现为异源、富含骨髓的实体癌的抗原选择和靶向提供了新策略。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Chromatin landscape and epigenetic heterogeneity of acute myeloid leukaemia.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Yotaro Ochi; Markus Liew-Littorin; Yasuhito Nannya; Sofia Bengtzen; Benedicte Piauger; Stefan Deneberg; Martin Jädersten; Vladimir Lazarevic
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Acute myeloid leukaemia (AML) is an aggressive blood cancer characterized by the unregulated proliferation of immature myeloblasts. Gene mutations have been shown to have a large effect on pathogenesis, inter-tumour heterogeneity and clinical outcomes in AML1-8; however, the role of epigenetic alterations in these respects has been investigated less extensively. Here we use ATAC-seq (assay for transposase-accessible chromatin with sequencing) in a cohort of 1,563 individuals with a recent diagnosis of AML (the 'eCHROMA' cohort) to show that AML can be classified into 16 subgroups on the basis of chromatin accessibility profiles. Multiomics analyses of gene mutations, the transcriptome, DNA methylation and histone marks show that these ATAC subgroups exhibit distinct driver mutations, differentiation states, gene expression, DNA methylation and super-enhancer profiles, and are also associated with clinical outcomes. These findings were validated in independent cohorts. Single-cell ATAC sequencing reveals that all leukaemic cells in each subgroup share a common chromatin accessibility profile, which suggests that subgroup-specific epigenomic fingerprints underlie the ATAC-based classification. Mechanistically, the subgroups have distinct gene-regulatory networks that are driven by the activities of key transcription factors in haematopoiesis, and in which subgroup-specific super-enhancers have a pivotal role. Multiomics single-cell analysis further reveals deregulated trajectories of differentiation coupled with chromatin accessibility and gene expression. Notably, ATAC subgroups have an independent prognostic effect, compared with genomic classification, and are associated with particular drug sensitivities. In summary, ATAC-based chromatin profiling, combined with multiomics data, provides insights into AML pathogenesis beyond genomics and constitutes a valuable resource for AML research.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Chromatin landscape and epigenetic heterogeneity of acute myeloid leukaemia.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 急性髓系白血病的染色质景观和表观遗传异质性。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 急性髓系白血病 (AML) 是一种侵袭性血癌，其特征是未成熟成粒细胞增殖失控。基因突变已被证明对 AML1-8 的发病机制、肿瘤间异质性和临床结果有很大影响；然而，表观遗传改变在这些方面的作用尚未得到广泛研究。在这里，我们在 1,563 名最近诊断为 AML 的个体（“eCHROMA”队列）中使用 ATAC-seq（转座酶可及染色质测序分析），以表明 AML 可根据染色质可及性概况分为 16 个亚组。对基因突变、转录组、DNA 甲基化和组蛋白标记的多组学分析表明，这些 ATAC 亚组表现出不同的驱动突变、分化状态、基因表达、DNA 甲基化和超级增强子谱，并且也与临床结果相关。这些发现在独立队列中得到了验证。单细胞 ATAC 测序显示，每个亚组中的所有白血病细胞都具有共同的染色质可及性特征，这表明亚组特异性表观基因组指纹是基于 ATAC 的分类的基础。从机制上讲，这些亚组具有独特的基因调控网络，这些网络由造血中关键转录因子的活动驱动，并且亚组特异性超级增强子在其中发挥着关键作用。多组学单细胞分析进一步揭示了分化的失调轨迹以及染色质可及性和基因表达。值得注意的是，与基因组分类相比，ATAC 亚组具有独立的预后效应，并且与特定的药物敏感性相关。总之，基于 ATAC 的染色质分析与多组学数据相结合，提供了基因组学之外的 AML 发病机制的见解，并构成了 AML 研究的宝贵资源。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: King's stages of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: an 18F-FDG-PET study of brain connectivity.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Francesca Di Pede; Sara Cabras; Umberto Manera; Rosario Vasta; Grazia Zocco; Emilio Minerva; Enrico Matteoni; Filippo De Mattei
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is a fatal neurodegenerative disease affecting upper and lower motor neurons. TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43) proteinopathy is the neuropathological signature of the disease, and 18F-fluorodeoxyglucose PET (18F-FDG-PET) serves as a marker of neurodegeneration in vivo. The aim of the present cross-sectional study was to disentangle 18F-FDG-PET correlates of disease severity assessed through the King's staging system, by exploring connectivity changes across motor stages. Patients with ALS classified as King's stage 1, 2 or 3, who underwent brain 18F-FDG-PET at diagnosis from 2008 to 2022 at the ALS Centre of Turin, were included. A multiple regression analysis to evaluate the relationship between brain metabolism and King's stage was performed. The clusters showing significant results were used as seed regions in an interregional correlation analysis (IRCA), performed for each stage. Of a total of 832 patients with ALS, 337 were classified as King's stage 1, 274 as stage 2 and 221 as stage 3. The three groups significantly differed in age at PET, disease duration and total ALS Functional Rating Scale Revised (ALSFRS-R) score at the time of PET, C9orf72 status and the distribution of cognitive categories. We found a decreasing metabolic gradient from King's stage 1 to King's stage 3 in a cluster encompassing motor and cognitive areas. As King's stage increases, we found a decrease of connectivity within the sensorimotor and cognitive areas. The IRCA also showed the connectivity of motor and cognitive regions with temporal and cerebellar regions. The connectivity with temporal regions found in King's stage 1 decreases in King's stage 2 and finally, disappears in King's stage 3. The connectivity with the cerebellum occurs in King's stage 2 and decreases in King's stage 3. The changes of connectivity of motor and cognitive areas with temporal and cerebellar regions among different King's stages might reflect the spread of TDP-43 proteinopathy or a compensatory mechanism, respectively. The present study suggests that 18F-FDG-PET imaging of the brain may be integrated with the King's staging system to assess the extent of the pathogenic process in the context of clinical trials.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: King's stages of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: an 18F-FDG-PET study of brain connectivity.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症的 King 阶段：大脑连接的 18F-FDG-PET 研究。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）是一种致命的神经退行性疾病，影响上运动神经元和下运动神经元。 TAR DNA 结合蛋白 43 (TDP-43) 蛋白病是该疾病的神经病理学特征，18F-氟脱氧葡萄糖 PET (18F-FDG-PET) 是体内神经变性的标志物。本横断面研究的目的是通过探索运动阶段的连接变化，理清通过 King 分期系统评估的 18F-FDG-PET 与疾病严重程度的相关性。研究纳入了 2008 年至 2022 年在都灵 ALS 中心诊断时接受脑部 18F-FDG-PET 诊断的 King's 1、2 或 3 期 ALS 患者。进行了多元回归分析来评估脑代谢与国王分期之间的关系。显示显着结果的簇被用作区域间相关分析 (IRCA) 中的种子区域，针对每个阶段进行。在总共 832 名 ALS 患者中，337 名被分类为 King's 1 期，274 名被分类为 2 期，221 名被分类为 3 期。三组在 PET 年龄、疾病持续时间和 PET 时 ALS 功能评定量表修订版 (ALSFRS-R) 总分、C9orf72 状态和认知类别分布方面存在显着差异。我们发现，在包含运动和认知区域的集群中，从 King's 第一阶段到 King's 第三阶段，代谢梯度逐渐减小。随着金阶段的增加，我们发现感觉运动和认知区域内的连接性减少。 IRCA 还显示了运动和认知区域与颞叶和小脑区域的连通性。 King's 1期中发现的与颞区的连通性在King's 2期中减少，最后在King's 3期中消失。与小脑的连通性出现在King's 2期中，并在King's 3期中减少。不同King's阶段中运动和认知区域与颞叶和小脑区域的连通性变化可能分别反映了TDP-43蛋白病的扩散或补偿机制。目前的研究表明，大脑的 18F-FDG-PET 成像可以与 King 分期系统相结合，以评估帕特的程度……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Tau pathology in epilepsy: emerging mechanisms and translational opportunities.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Arjune Sen; Xin You Tai; Aristea Galanopoulou; Maria Thom; Eleonora Aronica; Lucy Vivash; Martin Hardmeier; Action Amos
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: The onset of epilepsy in adulthood occurs most commonly after 55 years of age. Given the ageing global population, this disorder represents an increasing burden on healthcare and society. The bidirectional link between epilepsy and dementia is a focus of intense research with underlying tau pathology highlighted as a potential mechanistic link. In this review, we examine the evidence for tau-related neurodegenerative processes in epilepsy beginning with how changes in biochemical and structural properties of the tau protein can lead to abnormal phosphorylation and pathological aggregation. We consider the role of tau in seizure occurrence and cognitive difficulties in experimental animal epilepsy models to human epileptic syndromes. Seizure prevalence is evaluated across established primary and secondary tauopathies to understand the associated hyperexcitability phenotype. We discuss the use of neurophysiology, metabolic imaging and novel fluid biomarkers as non-invasive measures of potential underlying neurodegeneration in epilepsy. It may, for example, be that these can be combined with remote measures of cognition and other physiological parameters to provide accurate longitudinal monitoring of cognition and underlying pathology. We also explore clinical trials that have targeted pathological tau accumulation in neurodegenerative conditions and consider an ongoing clinical study with sodium selenate, an enhancer of protein phosphatase enzyme PP2A, in people with epilepsy. These efforts signify a novel disease-modifying era with treatments that reduce seizures and modify cognitive outcomes in people with epilepsy. Our analysis of the literature underscores the need for more in-depth characterization of tau pathology, at biochemical and structural levels in brain tissue and peripheral samples from people with epilepsy, as an important step to deciphering the role of tau in the pathogenesis of epilepsy and related disorders. Examining the relationships between tau pathology and cognitive impairment in those with epilepsy provides critical perspectives on potential causal tau pathomechanisms that may have important roles in epileptogenesis and dementia.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Tau pathology in epilepsy: emerging mechanisms and translational opportunities.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 癫痫中的 Tau 蛋白病理学：新兴机制和转化机会。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 成年期癫痫最常见于 55 岁以后。鉴于全球人口老龄化，这种疾病给医疗保健和社会带来了越来越大的负担。癫痫和痴呆之间的双向联系是深入研究的焦点，其中潜在的 tau 病理学被强调为潜在的机制联系。在这篇综述中，我们从 tau 蛋白的生化和结构特性的变化如何导致异常磷酸化和病理聚集开始，研究了癫痫中与 tau 相关的神经退行性过程的证据。我们考虑了 tau 在人类癫痫综合征实验动物癫痫模型中癫痫发作和认知困难中的作用。评估已确定的原发性和继发性 tau蛋白病的癫痫发作率，以了解相关的过度兴奋表型。我们讨论使用神经生理学、代谢成像和新型液体生物标志物作为癫痫潜在潜在神经退行性变的非侵入性测量。例如，这些可以与认知和其他生理参数的远程测量相结合，以提供对认知和潜在病理学的准确纵向监测。我们还探索了针对神经退行性疾病中病理性 tau 蛋白积累的临床试验，并考虑正在进行一项针对癫痫患者的硒酸钠（蛋白磷酸酶 PP2A 的增强剂）临床研究。这些努力标志着一个新的疾病缓解时代，通过治疗可以减少癫痫患者的癫痫发作并改变认知结果。我们对文献的分析强调，需要在癫痫患者的脑组织和外周样本的生化和结构水平上更深入地表征 tau 病理学，这是破译 tau 在癫痫及相关疾病发病机制中的作用的重要一步。检查癫痫患者的 tau 蛋白病理学与认知障碍之间的关系，为研究可能在癫痫发生和痴呆中发挥重要作用的潜在因果 tau 蛋白病理机制提供了重要的视角。

核心发现：成年期癫痫最常见于 55 岁以后。鉴于全球人口老龄化，这种疾病给医疗保健和社会带来了越来越大的负担。癫痫和痴呆之间的双向联系是深入研究的焦点，其中潜在的 tau 病理学被强调为潜在的机制联系。在这篇综述中，我们从 tau 蛋白的生化和结构特性的变化如何导致异常磷酸化和病理聚集开始，研究了癫痫中与 tau 相关的神经退行性过程的证据。我们考虑了 tau 在人类癫痫综合征实验动物癫痫模型中癫痫发作和认知困难中的作用。评估已确定的原发性和继发性 tau蛋白病的癫痫发作率，以了解相关的过度兴奋表型。我们讨论使用神经生理学、代谢成像和新型液体生物标志物作为癫痫潜在潜在神经退行性变的非侵入性测量。例如，这些可以与认知和其他生理参数的远程测量相结合，以提供对认知和潜在病理学的准确纵向监测。我们还探索了针对神经退行性疾病中病理性 tau 蛋白积累的临床试验，并考虑正在进行一项针对癫痫患者的硒酸钠（蛋白磷酸酶 PP2A 的增强剂）临床研究。这些努力标志着一个新的疾病缓解时代，通过治疗可以减少癫痫患者的癫痫发作并改变认知结果。我们对文献的分析强调，需要在癫痫患者的脑组织和外周样本的生化和结构水平上更深入地表征 tau 病理学，这是破译 tau 在癫痫及相关疾病发病机制中的作用的重要一步。检查癫痫患者的 tau 蛋白病理学与认知障碍之间的关系，为研究可能在癫痫发生和痴呆中发挥重要作用的潜在因果 tau 蛋白病理机制提供了重要的视角。

global_hot_topics.title: Treatment trajectories and patterns following non-medical switching to biosimilar adalimumab in patients with hidradenitis suppurativa: a retrospective observational multicenter study from Saudi Arabia.
global_hot_topics.authors: Ahmed Alamer; Taibah AbuTaki; Shareefa Mohammed Alonaizi; Dalal Saadoun Alsaadoun; Mukhtar Alomar
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Adalimumab is the first biologic approved for moderate-to-severe hidradenitis suppurativa (HS). Considering potential cost savings, real-world data evaluating the prescribing patterns following a switch from the originator in HS remain limited. METHODS: We conducted a retrospective multicenter observational study (2019-2025) at two hospitals in Saudi Arabia. Adult HS patients who received originator adalimumab for ≥3 months, and then switched to its biosimilar for non-medical reasons for ≥3 months were included. Descriptive statistics summarized baseline characteristics. A Wilcoxon paired test compared treatment durations, and a Sankey diagram illustrated treatment pathways. RESULTS: A total of 40 patients were included (median age: 26 years; 62.5% male; median BMI: 31.6). Most presented with nodules (55.0%), abscesses (47.5%), and sinus tracts (37.5%). Among all treatment actions/pathways, 22.6% represented treatment escalation to an alternative biologic, specifically secukinumab or ustekinumab. Patients who were switched from biosimilar therapy demonstrated more severe disease involvement. Median duration of originator therapy was 6.0 months versus 21.0 months for biosimilar (p = 0.477), with no significant difference in treatment persistence. CONCLUSION: In this small real-world cohort, treatment escalation after switching to biosimilar adalimumab was observed in a subset of patients with more complex HS features. Larger studies using standardized severity measures are needed to confirm these observations. Hidradenitis suppurativa is a long-term skin condition that can cause painful lumps, abscesses, tunnels under the skin, and scarring. Adalimumab is one of the treatments used for moderate-to-severe hidradenitis suppurativa. In some hospitals, patients may be changed from the original adalimumab product to a biosimilar version, which is designed to be highly similar to the original version and may help reduce treatment costs.In this study, we reviewed 40 patients from two hospitals in Saudi Arabia who were changed from the original adalimumab to a biosimilar adalimumab for non-medical reasons, mainly because of hospital formulary changes. We examined prescribing patterns and treatment received after the switch.Some patients continued biosimilar adalimumab, while others required changes in their treatment plan. These changes included adding other medications, such as antibiotics or topical treatments, or switching to another biologic treatment. Patients who needed treatment changes often had more complex hidradenitis suppurativa features, such as nodules, abscesses, sinus tracts, scarring, or disease affecting more than one body area.This study describes real-world treatment patterns after switching to biosimilar adalimumab. The findings suggest that follow-up after switching may be important, especially for patients with more complex disease. Larger studies using standard disease severity measures are needed.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Treatment trajectories and patterns following non-medical switching to biosimilar adalimumab in patients with hidradenitis suppurativa: a retrospective observational multicenter study from Saudi Arabia.

global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：阿达木单抗是第一个被批准用于治疗中重度化脓性汗腺炎（HS）的生物制剂。考虑到潜在的成本节省，评估 HS 发起者转换后的处方模式的实际数据仍然有限。方法：我们在沙特阿拉伯的两家医院进行了一项回顾性多中心观察研究（2019-2025）。接受原研阿达木单抗治疗 ≥3 个月，然后因非医疗原因改用其生物仿制药治疗 ≥3 个月的成人 HS 患者被纳入研究。描述性统计总结了基线特征。 Wilcoxon 配对测试比较了治疗持续时间，桑基图说明了治疗路径。结果：总共纳入 40 名患者（中位年龄：26 岁；62.5% 为男性；中位 BMI：31.6）。大多数表现为结节（55.0%）、脓肿（47.5%）和窦道（37.5%）。在所有治疗行动/途径中，22.6% 表示治疗升级至替代生物制剂，特别是苏金单抗或优特克单抗。从生物仿制药转为治疗的患者表现出更严重的疾病症状。原研药治疗的中位持续时间为 6.0 个月，而生物仿制药为 21.0 个月 (p = 0.477)，治疗持续性没有显着差异。结论：在这个小型现实世界队列中，在具有更复杂 HS 特征的患者亚组中观察到改用生物仿制药阿达木单抗后治疗升级。需要使用标准化严重程度测量的更大规模的研究来证实这些观察结果。化脓性汗腺炎是一种长期皮肤病，可引起疼痛性肿块、脓肿、皮下隧道和疤痕。阿达木单抗是用于中度至重度化脓性汗腺炎的治疗方法之一。在一些医院，患者可能会从原来的阿达木单抗产品改为生物仿制药版本，该版本的设计与原来的版本高度相似，可能有助于降低治疗成本。在这项研究中，我们回顾了来自沙特阿拉伯两家医院的 40 名患者，这些患者因非医疗原因从原来的阿达木单抗改为生物仿制药阿达木单抗，主要是因为医院处方的变化。我们考试……

global_hot_topics.title: Immune regulatory mechanisms and potential microbiota-associated targets in Kawasaki disease: an integrative multi-omics and network pharmacology study.
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kawasaki disease (KD) is a systemic vasculitis in children primarily affecting the coronary arteries, and studies suggest that the gut microbiota may be involved in KD pathogenesis, inflammatory responses, and immune regulation. This study employed an integrative multi-omics strategy to systematically investigate gut microbiota-metabolite interactions in KD. Key molecular targets were identified using network-based analyses and machine learning models, with Mendelian randomization providing causal validation. Single-cell transcriptomics and molecular docking further elucidated immune cell interactions and metabolite-protein binding, highlighting critical regulatory pathways. We identified SELP as a core molecular target in KD, predominantly expressed in platelets and involved in immune and inflammatory responses. Gut microbiota-derived metabolites, including palmitoylethanolamide, pantothenic acid, and 1-O-caffeoylglycerol, may regulate immune cell interactions via the RESISTIN signalling pathway. Altered abundances of microbial taxa such as Bacteroides, Parabacteroides, and Bifidobacterium suggest their potential role in inflammation modulation. Activation of IL-17, TNF, MAPK, and PI3K-Akt pathways further contributes to disease progression, highlighting the microbiota-metabolite-SELP axis as a potential therapeutic target in KD. These findings lay the groundwork for subsequent in vitro and in vivo studies, advancing the development of microbiome-based intervention strategies.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Immune regulatory mechanisms and potential microbiota-associated targets in Kawasaki disease: an integrative multi-omics and network pharmacology study.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 川崎病的免疫调节机制和潜在的微生物相关靶标：一项综合多组学和网络药理学研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 川崎病 (KD) 是一种主要影响冠状动脉的儿童系统性血管炎，研究表明肠道微生物群可能参与 KD 发病机制、炎症反应和免疫调节。本研究采用综合多组学策略来系统地研究川崎病中肠道微生物群与代谢物的相互作用。使用基于网络的分析和机器学习模型确定了关键分子靶点，并通过孟德尔随机化提供因果验证。单细胞转录组学和分子对接进一步阐明了免疫细胞相互作用和代谢物-蛋白质结合，突出了关键的调控途径。我们将 SELP 确定为 KD 的核心分子靶点，主要在血小板中表达并参与免疫和炎症反应。肠道微生物群衍生的代谢物，包括棕榈酰乙醇酰胺、泛酸和 1-O-咖啡酰甘油，可能通过 RESISTIN 信号通路调节免疫细胞相互作用。拟杆菌属、副拟杆菌属和双歧杆菌等微生物类群丰度的改变表明它们在炎症调节中的潜在作用。 IL-17、TNF、MAPK 和 PI3K-Akt 通路的激活进一步促进疾病进展，凸显微生物群-代谢物-SELP 轴作为 KD 的潜在治疗靶点。这些发现为后续的体外和体内研究奠定了基础，推动了基于微生物组的干预策略的发展。

global_hot_topics.title: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
global_hot_topics.authors: Gonglin Tang; Fei Liu; Mingze Sun; Chenyue Liu; Jitao Wu; Hongwei Zhao
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kidney renal clear cell carcinoma (KIRC) features an immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME). We investigated the role of transcription factor POU2F2 in KIRC oncogenesis and macrophage polarization. Single-cell and spatial transcriptomics showed that POU2F2 is upregulated in KIRC and associated with metastasis and poor prognosis. POU2F2 knockdown inhibited KIRC cell proliferation, migration, and invasion in vitro. POU2F2 expression correlated with macrophage infiltration and JAK-STAT signaling. Co-culture assays showed that POU2F2 silencing reduced macrophage recruitment and shifted M2 polarization toward an anti-tumor M1 phenotype. Overall, POU2F2 acts as an oncogenic driver and prognostic biomarker in KIRC, promoting an immunosuppressive TME and representing a potential therapeutic target.

global_hot_topics.title: Multi-omics profiling identifies CDK1 as a key mediator of mitosis through the PTN pathway in bladder cancer.
global_hot_topics.authors: Li Yang; Jia-Ming Zhang; Yu-Jia Chen; Zhong-Qiong Wei; Mei Zhou; Guo-Qiang Chen; Yu-Xian He; Zhi-Guang Huang
global_hot_topics.abstract: AIMS: This study aimed to characterize cyclin-dependent kinase 1 (CDK1) expression in bladder cancer (BC), elucidate its role in intercellular signaling and mitosis, and identify small-molecule inhibitors targeting CDK1. METHODS: RNA sequencing data from multiple databases were integrated, with immunohistochemistry on tissue microarrays validating protein expression. Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq), spatial transcriptomics (ST), gene set enrichment analysis (GSEA), and molecular docking with molecular dynamics (MD) simulations were performed. RESULTS: CDK1 mRNA and protein were significantly overexpressed in BC tissues. CDK1 expression correlated with patient age and race. CDK1 was predominantly expressed in epithelial cells and central to pleiotrophin (PTN) pathway-mediated intercellular communication; virtual CDK1 knockout markedly reduced PTN signaling strength. ST confirmed CDK1 enrichment in tumor regions. GSEA linked CDK1 to mitosis and chromosome segregation, and scRNA-seq analyses revealed a PTN-CDK1-mitosis regulatory axis active specifically in epithelial cells. Dinaciclib showed favorable MD stability as a CDK1 inhibitor. CONCLUSION: CDK1 is significantly overexpressed in BC with good discriminatory ability. Predominantly expressed in BC epithelial cells, CDK1 may be activated by PTN signaling to drive mitosis. MD simulations support Dinaciclib as a promising CDK1-targeting inhibitor. Bladder cancer is one of the most common cancers of the urinary tract worldwide. Many patients face a difficult challenge: after standard treatments, tumors frequently come back, and existing targeted therapies work for only a small proportion of people. There is therefore an urgent need to better understand what drives bladder cancer growth and to find new treatment targets.This study focused on a protein called CDK1, which acts like a molecular “switch” controlling how and when cells divide. Using data from hundreds of bladder cancer tissue samples across multiple international databases, alongside laboratory staining experiments on tumor tissue, we confirmed that CDK1 levels are significantly higher in bladder cancer than in normal bladder tissue, and that CDK1 can reliably distinguish cancerous from healthy tissue.By examining individual cancer cells using advanced single-cell technologies, we found that CDK1 is concentrated mainly in the lining cells of the bladder tumor. We also identified that a signaling molecule called PTN appears to “switch on” CDK1 in these cells, which in turn drives tumor cells to divide and multiply more rapidly.Finally, using computer-based drug-screening methods, we identified Dinaciclib as a particularly promising molecule capable of blocking CDK1 activity, with stable binding behavior confirmed by computer simulations.

global_hot_topics.title: Clinical Outcomes After Failed Endoscopic Detorsion for Sigmoid Volvulus: A Single-Center Retrospective Cohort Study.
global_hot_topics.authors: Hidehiro Kamezaki; Arisa Kato; Nana Yamada; Terunao Iwanaga; Takafumi Sakuma; Koji Takahashi; Junichi Senoo; Sadahisa Ogasawara
global_hot_topics.abstract: OBJECTIVES: Endoscopic detorsion is the first-line treatment for sigmoid volvulus (SV); however, detorsion is not always successful. We evaluated clinical outcomes after failed endoscopic detorsion and assessed recurrence in patients who achieved clinical success after decompression. METHODS: This single-center retrospective cohort study included 47 patients with first-episode SV, of whom 43 underwent endoscopic management. Baseline characteristics and short-term outcomes were compared between successful and failed detorsion groups. Among patients with clinical success, the in-hospital course and 1-year cumulative recurrence were compared between the successful detorsion and successful decompression groups. Cumulative recurrence was evaluated using the Kaplan-Meier method. RESULTS: Successful detorsion was achieved in 21 of 43 patients (48.8%). Among 22 patients with failed detorsion, 17 achieved clinical success after decompression, whereas five had clinical failure, including four who underwent emergency surgery and one who died the following day. The overall clinical success rate was 88.4% (38/43). Failed detorsion was associated with lower room-air oxygen saturation and higher lactate levels. Clinical success was less frequent in the failed detorsion group (77.3% vs. 100%, p = 0.065), and hospital stay was longer (median 13 vs. 7 days, p = 0.071). Among patients with clinical success, time to resumption of oral intake was shorter in the successful detorsion group (median 1.5 vs. 3 days, p = 0.004), whereas the 1-year cumulative recurrence rate was numerically higher but not statistically significant (79.6 vs. 51.3%, log-rank p = 0.087). CONCLUSIONS: After assessing the need for emergency surgery, decompression alone may not always require immediate repeat detorsion in selected patients who improve clinically. TRIAL REGISTRATION: N/A.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Clinical Outcomes After Failed Endoscopic Detorsion for Sigmoid Volvulus: A Single-Center Retrospective Cohort Study.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 乙状结肠扭转内镜扭转失败后的临床结果：单中心回顾性队列研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：内镜扭转是乙状结肠扭转（SV）的一线治疗方法；然而，扭转并不总是成功。我们评估了内镜扭转失败后的临床结果，并评估了减压后临床成功的患者的复发情况。方法：这项单中心回顾性队列研究纳入了 47 例首发 SV 患者，其中 43 例接受了内镜治疗。比较成功和失败扭转组之间的基线特征和短期结果。在临床成功的患者中，比较成功扭转组和成功减压组的院内病程​​和1年累积复发情况。使用Kaplan-Meier方法评估累积复发率。结果：43 名患者中有 21 名患者成功扭转（48.8%）。 22例扭转失败的患者中，17例减压后获得临床成功，5例临床失败，其中4例接受紧急手术，1例第二天死亡。总体临床成功率为88.4%（38/43）。扭转失败与较低的室内空气氧饱和度和较高的乳酸水平有关。扭转失败组的临床成功率较低（77.3% vs. 100%，p = 0.065），住院时间较长（中位时间 13 天 vs. 7 天，p = 0.071）。在临床成功的患者中，成功扭转组恢复经口摄入的时间较短（中位 1.5 天 vs. 3 天，p = 0.004），而 1 年累积复发率在数值上较高，但不具有统计学意义（79.6% vs. 51.3%，对数秩 p = 0.087）。结论：在评估紧急手术的必要性后，对于临床改善的选定患者，单纯减压可能并不总是需要立即重复扭转。试用注册：不适用。

核心发现：目的：内镜扭转是乙状结肠扭转（SV）的一线治疗方法；然而，扭转并不总是成功。我们评估了内镜扭转失败后的临床结果，并评估了减压后临床成功的患者的复发情况。方法：这项单中心回顾性队列研究纳入了 47 例首发 SV 患者，其中 43 例接受了内镜治疗。比较成功和失败扭转组之间的基线特征和短期结果。在临床成功的患者中，比较成功扭转组和成功减压组的院内病程​​和1年累积复发情况。使用Kaplan-Meier方法评估累积复发率。结果：43 名患者中有 21 名患者成功扭转（48.8%）。 22例扭转失败的患者中，17例减压后获得临床成功，5例临床失败，其中4例接受紧急手术，1例第二天死亡。总体临床成功率为88.4%（38/43）。扭转失败与较低的室内空气氧饱和度和较高的乳酸水平有关。扭转失败组的临床成功率较低（77.3% vs. 100%，p = 0.065），住院时间较长（中位时间 13 天 vs. 7 天，p = 0.071）。在临床成功的患者中，成功扭转组恢复经口摄入的时间较短（中位 1.5 天 vs. 3 天，p = 0.004），而 1 年累积复发率在数值上较高，但不具有统计学意义（79.6% vs. 51.3%，对数秩 p = 0.087）。结论：在评估紧急手术的必要性后，对于临床改善的选定患者，单纯减压可能并不总是需要立即重复扭转。试用注册：不适用。

global_hot_topics.title: Immune evasion in locally advanced mismatch repair-deficient microsatellite instability-high colorectal cancer: Reduced T-cell infiltration and upregulation of epithelial IDO1 expression.
global_hot_topics.authors: Sabina Niyazova; Christine Sers; Hendrik Bläker; David Horst; Wolfgang Schmitt; Zehra Karadeniz; Simon Schallenberg; Alexej Ballhausen
global_hot_topics.abstract: Early-stage colorectal cancer (CRC) with confirmed microsatellite instability generally has a favorable prognosis associated with pronounced immune infiltration. However, some patients still develop metastases. The underlying mechanisms, particularly those related to the tumor immune microenvironment, remain incompletely understood. The study included tissue samples from 217 patients with dMMR/MSI-H CRC, comprising 89 stage III/IV and 128 stage I/II cases. Tissue microarrays and immunohistochemical analyzes were performed for all cases. We evaluated immune markers identifying T cells, B cells, dendritic cells, natural killer cells, macrophages, immunosuppressive markers, and immune checkpoint targets in epithelial and stromal compartments, and additionally performed a cohort-derived immune infiltration score (IIS). The survival analysis assessed the prognostic impact of immune markers stratified by tumor stage. Stage I/II dMMR/MSI-H CRCs showed significantly higher CD3⁺ T-cell and natural killer cell levels, higher IIS metrics across all regions, and higher CD4⁺ T helper cell levels in the stroma. Stage III/IV cases exhibited increased epithelial expression of indoleamine 2,3-dioxygenase 1. Given the limited number of stage IV patients, an additional stage III vs. stage I/II comparison was performed, revealing that these immune differences were already evident at the level of nodal progression. In addition, CD3⁺, CD4⁺, and CD8⁺ T cells and the IIS showed varying prognostic associations across tumor stages. These findings suggest that the overall immunogenicity and prognostic relevance of immune markers in dMMR/MSI-H CRC depend on tumor stage. Immune profiling could be used for early-stage patient stratification and also suggests the potential benefit of early immunotherapeutic intervention.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Immune evasion in locally advanced mismatch repair-deficient microsatellite instability-high colorectal cancer: Reduced T-cell infiltration and upregulation of epithelial IDO1 expression.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 局部晚期错配修复缺陷-微卫星不稳定性-高结直肠癌中的免疫逃避：T细胞浸润减少和上皮IDO1表达上调。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 已证实微卫星不稳定性的早期结直肠癌（CRC）通常具有良好的预后，且与明显的免疫浸润相关。然而，一些患者仍然出现转移。潜在的机制，特别是与肿瘤免疫微环境相关的机制，仍不完全清楚。该研究包括 217 名 dMMR/MSI-H CRC 患者的组织样本，其中包括 89 名 III/IV 期病例和 128 名 I/II 期病例。对所有病例进行组织微阵列和免疫组织化学分析。我们评估了识别上皮和基质区室中的 T 细胞、B 细胞、树突状细胞、自然杀伤细胞、巨噬细胞、免疫抑制标记物和免疫检查点目标的免疫标记物，并另外进行了队列衍生的免疫浸润评分 (IIS)。生存分析评估了按肿瘤分期分层的免疫标记物的预后影响。 I/II 期 dMMR/MSI-H CRC 显示显着更高的 CD3⁺ T 细胞和自然杀伤细胞水平、所有区域更高的 IIS 指标以及基质中更高的 CD4⁺ T 辅助细胞水平。 III/IV 期病例表现出吲哚胺 2,3-双加氧酶 1 的上皮表达增加。鉴于 IV 期患者数量有限，进行了额外的 III 期与 I/II 期比较，揭示了这些免疫差异在淋巴结进展水平上已经很明显。此外，CD3⁺、CD4⁺和CD8⁺ T细胞和IIS在不同肿瘤阶段表现出不同的预后关联。这些发现表明，dMMR/MSI-H CRC 中免疫标记物的总体免疫原性和预后相关性取决于肿瘤分期。免疫分析可用于早期患者分层，也表明早期免疫治疗干预的潜在益处。

global_hot_topics.title: Human gut flagellome profiling using FlaPro reveals TLR5-related phenotype-specific alterations in IBD.
global_hot_topics.authors: Anna A Bogdanova; Andrea Borbón-García; Ruth E Ley; Alexander V Tyakht
global_hot_topics.abstract: Flagellin, the structural protein of bacterial flagella, activates the innate immune receptor Toll-like receptor 5 (TLR5). However, the ability of different flagellins to bind and stimulate TLR5 varies widely, suggesting that the composition of an individual's flagellin repertoire, defined as flagellome, may influence host-microbiome interactions and inflammation. Here, we developed FlaPro, a computational pipeline for quantification and functional annotation of human gut flagellomes. Functional categories in FlaPro are derived from a machine learning model trained on experimentally characterized flagellins with defined TLR5-binding and stimulatory activities. Application of FlaPro to a multi-omics inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) cohort revealed a marked depletion of flagellome diversity and a reduced ratio of silent to stimulatory flagellins in Crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis. These alterations were consistent across genomic and transcriptional layers, indicating a disease-associated shift toward more stimulatory flagellome profiles. Our findings suggest that specific features of the gut flagellome contribute to TLR5-mediated immune activation and may serve as functionally interpretable microbiome markers for future microbiome-wide association studies in health and disease. The workflow implemented in Snakemake is openly available at https://github.com/leylabmpi/FlaPro.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Human gut flagellome profiling using FlaPro reveals TLR5-related phenotype-specific alterations in IBD.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 使用 FlaPro 进行的人类肠道鞭毛组分析揭示了 IBD 中与 TLR5 相关的表型特异性改变。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 鞭毛蛋白是细菌鞭毛的结构蛋白，可激活先天免疫受体 Toll 样受体 5 (TLR5)。然而，不同鞭毛蛋白结合和刺激 TLR5 的能力差异很大，这表明个体鞭毛蛋白库（定义为鞭毛体）的组成可能会影响宿主-微生物组相互作用和炎症。在这里，我们开发了 FlaPro，一种用于人类肠道鞭毛定量和功能注释的计算管道。 FlaPro 中的功能类别源自机器学习模型，该模型在具有定义的 TLR5 结合和刺激活性的实验表征鞭毛蛋白上进行训练。 FlaPro 在多组学炎症性肠病 (IBD) 队列中的应用显示，克罗恩病和溃疡性结肠炎中鞭毛体多样性显着减少，沉默鞭毛蛋白与刺激性鞭毛蛋白的比例降低。这些改变在基因组和转录层中是一致的，表明与疾病相关的鞭毛组谱向更具刺激性的转变。我们的研究结果表明，肠道鞭毛体的特定特征有助于 TLR5 介导的免疫激活，并且可以作为未来健康和疾病微生物组范围关联研究的功能可解释的微生物组标记。 Snakemake 中实现的工作流程可在 https://github.com/leylabmpi/FlaPro 上公开获取。

global_hot_topics.title: Effects of serotonergic pharmacological manipulation on exercise performance and central fatigue: a systematic review and three-level meta-analysis.
global_hot_topics.journal: Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition
global_hot_topics.authors: Lulu Guan; Linhang Han; Yu Zou; Dushuo Feng; Pengxuan Xia; Yuxin Peng; Ziqi Fan
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Exercise-induced fatigue is a complex, non-pathological state that acutely limits physical performance, and the serotonergic (5-HT) system has been proposed as an important modulator of its central components. This systematic review and meta-analysis aimed to clarify the effects of serotonergic pharmacological manipulation on exercise-related outcomes. METHODS: Following PRISMA guidelines, we systematically searched PubMed, Scopus, Web of Science, Cochrane Central, and SportDiscus from inception to August 2025. Randomized controlled trials examining the effects of serotonergic pharmacological manipulation on exercise-related outcomes in healthy adults were included. Study selection, data extraction, and risk-of-bias assessment using RoB 2.0 were conducted independently. Pooled effects were synthesized using three-level random-effects models, and the certainty and robustness of the evidence were examined in additional analyses. RESULTS: Twenty-one randomized controlled trials involving 248 healthy adults were included in the systematic review, of which 19 studies involving 229 participants were included in the meta-analysis. In the primary models, serotonergic pharmacological manipulation was associated with small reductions in evoked motor response (Hedges' g = -0.24, 95% CI -0.46 to -0.02), time-domain EMG (Hedges' g = -0.18, 95% CI -0.33 to -0.02), heart rate (Hedges' g = -0.17, 95% CI -0.34 to -0.01), and blood glucose (Hedges' g = -0.50, 95% CI -0.89 to -0.11). Voluntary activation showed a borderline negative pooled estimate (Hedges' g = -0.20, 95% CI -0.40 to 0), whereas ratings of perceived exertion showed a positive but statistically uncertain pooled estimate (Hedges' g = 0.63, 95% CI -0.01 to 1.28). Resting twitch torque showed a small positive pooled effect (Hedges' g = 0.12, 95% CI 0.04 to 0.19), whereas superimposed twitch torque, maximal voluntary contraction, prolactin, lactic acid, and time to task failure did not show clear overall effects. CONCLUSIONS: Overall, this meta-analysis indicates that serotonergic pharmacological manipulation has outcome-specific effects on exercise-related fatigue rather than a single uniform influence across domains. The most consistent primary-model signals were found for evoked motor response, time-domain EMG, heart rate, and blood glucose, whereas overt performance and perceptual outcomes remained more variable. By integrating evidence across different serotonergic interventions and exercise paradigms, these findings improve our understanding of how 5-HT-related mechanisms may contribute to central fatigue during exercise.

medical_news.title: A common vitamin could help fight one of the deadliest brain cancers
medical_news.abstract: A clinical trial is exploring whether high doses of vitamin B3 could give patients with glioblastoma a better chance against the aggressive brain cancer. Scientists found that niacin may help revive immune cells that tumors shut down, allowing them to attack cancer more effectively. Early results have been promising, with patients showing significantly better progression-free survival than expected.

medical_news.title: New vitamin B12 therapy shows promise against deadly brain cancer
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have identified a vitamin B12–based compound that can cross the blood-brain barrier and home in on glioblastoma tumors. In animal studies, the compound accumulated preferentially in tumor tissue and delivered sustained nitric oxide directly to cancer cells. It also worked synergistically with existing glioblastoma treatments, significantly enhancing their tumor-fighting effects.
medical_news.title_en: New vitamin B12 therapy shows promise against deadly brain cancer

medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员发现了一种基于维生素 B12 的化合物，可以穿过血脑屏障并瞄准胶质母细胞瘤。在动物研究中，该化合物优先在肿瘤组织中积累，并将持续的一氧化氮直接输送到癌细胞。它还与现有的胶质母细胞瘤治疗协同作用，显着增强其抗肿瘤效果。

medical_news.title: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.abstract: Creatine is best known as a muscle-building supplement, but scientists are now investigating whether it could also help treat depression by boosting the brain's energy supply. A new review examined five randomized clinical trials involving 238 participants and found mixed results. Two studies, both involving women with major depressive disorder, reported that adding creatine to standard treatment improved symptoms, while three others found no meaningful benefit.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家称肌酸可能有助于对抗抑郁症
medical_news.abstract_cn: 肌酸最著名的是一种肌肉增强补充剂，但科学家们现在正在研究它是否也可以通过增加大脑的能量供应来帮助治疗抑郁症。一项新的综述审查了 5 项涉及 238 名参与者的随机临床试验，发现结果好坏参半。两项研究均涉及患有重度抑郁症的女性，报告称在标准治疗中添加肌酸可以改善症状，而其他三项研究则没有发现任何有意义的益处。

medical_news.title: New weight loss pill beats oral Ozempic in major trial
medical_news.abstract: A new once-daily weight-loss pill called orforglipron delivered better weight loss and blood sugar improvements for people with type 2 diabetes than the leading oral semaglutide in a major clinical trial. The tablet could offer a more convenient alternative to injectable drugs like Ozempic and Wegovy because it doesn't require refrigeration or special timing with meals. It's also cheaper to manufacture, which could expand access globally.
medical_news.title_en: New weight loss pill beats oral Ozempic in major trial
medical_news.title_cn: 新型减肥药在重大试验中胜过口服 Ozempic
medical_news.abstract_cn: 在一项大型临床试验中，一种名为 orforglipron 的新型每日一次减肥药比领先的口服索马鲁肽能够为 2 型糖尿病患者带来更好的减肥效果和血糖改善效果。该药片可以为 Ozempic 和 Wegovy 等注射药物提供更方便的替代品，因为它不需要冷藏或特殊的用餐时间。它的制造成本也更低，这可以扩大全球范围。

medical_news.title: NFL Players Face Fourfold Increase in Neurodegenerative Mortality
medical_news.abstract: A retrospective cohort study of 19,824 NFL players confirms that professional football veterans face a fourfold increase in neurodegenerative mortality, including a 3.8-fold surge in all-cause dementia and Parkinson's disease.

medical_news.title: Tiny silica particles wiped out aggressive prostate cancer in mice
medical_news.abstract: Tiny silica nanoparticles engineered to seek out prostate cancer caused tumor cells to self-destruct and supercharged the immune system in preclinical mouse studies. Combined with immunotherapy, the treatment produced complete remissions in multiple mice, raising hopes for a powerful new approach to prostate cancer.
